query: UPDATE users SET passwordHash = '$2b$10$3t2fM7iFHvY0akP.f.1GL.GpXy0aC.dbN2FqwbHx19j8O3wtTwokO' WHERE role = 'super_admin' AND (passwordHash IS NULL OR passwordHash = '') LIMIT 1; SELECT id, email, role, openId, passwordHash IS NOT NULL as hasPassword FROM users WHERE role = 'super_admin';
